compiled_state.title: plan-review skill dispatches as agent type 'dso:plan-review' but no agent definition exists — only a skill SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Observed in host project: plan-review is invoked as a sub-agent type 'dso:plan-review' but it is a skill (plugins/dso/skills/plan-review/SKILL.md), not an agent (no plugins/dso/agents/plan-review.md). Error: Agent type 'dso:plan-review' not found.

comments.body: Re-opened: initial fix applied without bot-psychologist investigation. These are LLM-behavioral bugs (skill/prompt behavioral gaps) that require proper bot-psychologist diagnosis per fix-bug SKILL.md dual-signal detection. The text changes committed are a first-pass fix — bot-psychologist should validate the behavioral diagnosis and confirm the fix addresses the actual root cause.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (Step 5 LLM exemption): After fix, either (a) plan-review agent definition exists at plugins/dso/agents/plan-review.md, OR (b) the dispatching code uses a different agent type. Check for file existence or grep for corrected dispatch.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
